test_cases.title: Add Redis caching layer to Customer API
test_cases.reason: Reduce database load and improve p95 latency from 800ms to <200ms. Current PostgreSQL queries are hitting 85% CPU during peak hours. Caching layer will reduce read load by ~70% based on read/write patterns analysis.
test_cases.test_notes: Standard caching pattern for read-heavy API. Redis is on tech radar ADOPT tier. Clear performance justification with metrics. Data classification allows caching.

test_cases.title: Introduce GraphQL gateway for mobile clients
test_cases.reason: Reduce over-fetching on mobile, improve app performance. Current REST endpoints return full objects, mobile only uses 30-40% of fields. GraphQL would reduce payload size by ~60% and allow flexible querying.
test_cases.test_notes: Apollo Server is on tech radar TRIAL tier. Touches multiple services. Sensitive data requires careful field-level security. Should trigger conditions around: authentication/authorization at field level, query complexity limits, rate limiting, monitoring.

test_cases.title: Replace PostgreSQL with MongoDB for user profiles
test_cases.reason: More flexible schema for user preferences. Team wants to iterate faster on profile fields without migrations.
test_cases.test_notes: Anti-pattern: wrong tool for the job. PostgreSQL jsonb handles flexible schemas well. User profiles are relational (link to orders, auth, billing). MongoDB not on tech radar for this use case. High-risk data migration. Should trigger RED flags from all specialists.

test_cases.title: Migrate CI/CD from GitHub Actions to Dagger
test_cases.reason: Portable CI pipelines, better local testing. GitHub Actions runs are slow (8-12 min), difficult to test locally. Dagger promises same pipelines run locally and in CI.
test_cases.test_notes: Dagger is new/cutting-edge, likely in ASSESS tier or not on tech radar. Impacts all services. Non-trivial migration effort. Team capability question: does DevOps have Dagger expertise? Should trigger DEFER: 'Pilot with 2-3 services first, prove value, then revisit.'

test_cases.title: Add Effect-TS for error handling in billing service
test_cases.reason: Type-safe error handling, better composability than try/catch. Billing logic has complex error paths (payment gateway failures, validation errors, retries). Effect-TS provides algebraic effects for managing these systematically.
test_cases.test_notes: Effect-TS is cutting-edge, likely not on tech radar. Steep learning curve. Single service impact. Should trigger: 'Interesting but unproven in our context. Pilot in non-critical path, assess team learning curve, revisit in Q2.'

metadata.purpose: End-to-end testing for Architecture Council Sprint 5
coverage: Standard APPROVE case (proven tech, clear metrics)
